steps.prompt: Flop: pressure spot with live equity. Choose action.
steps.why_v1: Call keeps the pot manageable while your equity is still live.
steps.feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Call is expected on this flop step.
steps.feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. With live equity but no need to bloat the pot yet, this flop should stay controlled with a call.

steps.prompt: Turn: value and pressure both improve. Choose action.
steps.why_v1: Half pot builds value while still keeping weaker hands in.
steps.feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Half pot is expected on this turn step.
steps.feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Once turn value improves without wanting to blow weaker hands out, this spot should use the half-pot size.

steps.prompt: River: value edge remains and bluff catchers can pay. Choose action.
steps.why_v1: Raise for value when worse bluff catchers can still continue.
steps.feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raise is expected on this river step.
steps.feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. When worse bluff catchers can still pay on the river, this line should finish with the value raise.
